title: CloudSync Dashboard
description: A real-time cloud infrastructure monitoring dashboard that reduced incident response time by 40%. Built for a team of 50+ DevOps engineers managing multi-cloud deployments.

title: MediTrack
description: A medication tracking app helping elderly patients stay on schedule. Integrated with pharmacy APIs for automatic refill reminders and caregiver notifications.

title: SentimentScope
description: An NLP-powered social media sentiment analyzer processing 100K+ tweets daily. Provides real-time brand perception dashboards for marketing teams.

title: DevFlow CLI
description: A developer productivity CLI tool that automates repetitive git workflows, PR templates, and deployment scripts. 500+ GitHub stars.

title: EcoRoute
description: A carbon-footprint-aware route planner for logistics companies. Optimizes delivery routes to minimize emissions while maintaining delivery SLAs.

title: PixelForge
description: An AI image generation tool with style transfer capabilities. Users can blend artistic styles with their photos for unique digital art.
